claim_backed: Anyone can register an agent. N can prove one.
verifiable_method: consult ledger: for each record recover EIP-191 sig over 'signed' and require it == claimed 'address'; count distinct passing addresses
active_method: flood_ledger.jsonl flood_job records from today, sig over message_signed recovers to citizen_address
note: verifiable = the signature proves control of the private key for that address; this is the honest basis for the site's 'can prove one' number. Census (2.7M) is signed identities; THIS is the subset provable by live signature recovery from the signed ledgers.
